name: Clicking "About Us" in the footer navigates to the About Us page

steps.name: Given  I am on the Sauce Demo homepage
When  I click the "About Us" link in the footer navigation
Then  the page title should be "About Us – Sauce Demo"

labels.name: story
labels.value: Clicking "About Us" in the footer navigates to the About Us page

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Clicking "About Us" in the footer navigates to the About Us page
